explanation_policy: contract_only; no hidden scores, no suppression, no runtime, no mutation
evidence_provenance_model: evidence_not_truth true; provenance_not_truth true; accepted_as_truth false
identity_grouping_deduplication_model: alternatives preserved; conflicts_hidden false; destructive_merge_performed false
ranking_relationship_model: no hidden score; no live ranking; ranking_not_truth true
absence_near_miss_gap_model: scoped absence; no global absence; gaps visible
action_safety_model: inspect/compare/cite only; downloads, installs, execution disabled
rights_risk_caution_model: no rights clearance, malware safety, dependency safety, or installability claims
user_facing_copy_policy: plain language, cautious, conflict and gap visible
api_static_lite_text_projection: future only; no runtime routes now
privacy_redaction_policy: no raw private query, paths, secrets, private URLs, IPs, account identifiers, or local fingerprints
no_hidden_score_no_truth_no_runtime_no_m: hard booleans false across examples and report
